song.title: Son Of God
song.presentation: V1 V2 C V3 V4 C B C
song.lyrics:
[v1] 1) Son of God, Shaper of the stars, You alone, The Dweller of my heart; Mighty King, How beautiful You are, How beautiful [v2] 2) Son of God, The Father's gift to us, You alone, Were broken on the alter of love; Precious Lamb, Our freedom's in Your blood, It's in Your blood [c] Chorus Jesus, oh, Holy One, I sing to You, forgiven; Savior, I'm overcome With your great love for me
[v3] 3) Son of God, Strength beyond compare, You alone, The darkness cannot bear; Lord of Love, Your kindness draws me near, It draws me near
[v4] 4) Son of God, Prophecy of old, You alone, Redeemer of my soul; Come again And lead your people home, Come lead us home [b] You are worthy, You are worthy; You are worthy of all my praise… You are beautiful, You are beautiful; I will lift up my hands and sing
